name: Vegetable Latkes
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the vegetables and press out excess liquid in a strainer.
2. Mix the flour and wheat germ with the grated vegetables in a bowl.
3. In another bowl, beat the eggs, minced garlic, and soy sauce together.
4. Combine the egg mixture with the vegetable mixture (if watery, add more flour or matzah meal).
5. Heat oil in a large, heavy skillet.
6. Cook the veggie mixture by spoonfuls over medium heat until brown and crisp, about 10 minutes.
7. Turn and cook the other side.
8. Serve hot with additional soy sauce to taste.
9. Makes 8 pancakes (4 servings of 2 pancakes each).
- Per serving: 240 calories; 12g protein; 10g fat; 31g carbohydrates; 107mg cholesterol; 182mg sodium.
